source: live CDP inspect of https://www.lunit.io/ on 2026-05-14

notes: Single-accent system. The blue (#1032cf / #2a4eef) is the only saturated hue on the marketing site.
Inks are warm-cool blacks (#232f32 = warm-cool gunmetal), not pure #000 for body text.
Primary CTA inverts: #000000 bg + #ffffff label, not the blue. Blue is reserved for system / cookie / data moments.
Display weights are LIGHT (300-400) — Lunit refuses the 'bold pharma' idiom. Authority comes from size + space, not weight.
Nav uses small-cap uppercase 13.2px — institutional, not friendly-app.
Body text is 300-weight Lexend, optimized for clinical readability (Lexend is designed to reduce reading fatigue).
100% flat by default. 0px corners are the system rule — sections, cards, images, nav all square.
The ONLY rounded element is the primary marketing CTA (`Contact Us`) — `border-radius: 100px` full pill.
This binary radius logic (0 OR pill) is the brand's geometric thesis: clinical surfaces are square; human-action moments are friendly.
No drop shadows on any surveyed surface. Depth is conveyed by color-band switching (white → black band → footer #eff0f4), not by elevation.

spacing.section_rhythm: vertical bands stacked edge-to-edge; sections claim full viewport width

notes: Scroll-reveal fades only; no parallax or large motion. Restrained because the audience is clinical (radiologists, regulators, investors).
